message:
test: add 37 proptest property tests for ntm_parity module

Covers assertion operators (Eq, IsArray, HasAny, In, Contains),
envelope validation (JSON/TOON), JSON path resolution, scenario
evaluation branching (success/failure), gate decisions (blocking/
HP/envelope/artifacts), divergence report consistency, serde
roundtrips, and metadata preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
